subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! Cling ye unto wisdom before utterance. Thus hath it been sent down in the Tablets of your Lord, the All-Merciful. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی علیکم بالحکمه قبل البیان هذا ما نزل فی الواح ربکم الرحمن طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
